breakdown: This PR stabilizes XP synthesis by prioritizing xp_awarded from combat/encounter summaries over rewards_pending. It removes the custom _extract_xp_from_player_data function in favor of a pre-existing extract_character_xp helper, and fixes the level-up pending wrapper to use ensure_level_up_rewards_pending. However, test coverage gaps exist - tests for the removed function remain but no tests verify the new priority logic or extract_character_xp usage. Type safety is decent with isinstance checks, but the migration to extract_character_xp should be verified with tests.
key_changes: Remove _extract_xp_from_player_data function and replace callers with extract_character_xp
Update XP synthesis to prioritize xp_awarded from combat_summary over rewards_pending
Update XP synthesis in encounter path to prioritize xp_awarded from encounter_summary
Refactor _check_and_set_level_up_pending to call ensure_level_up_rewards_pending instead of check_and_set_level_up_pending_impl
Add isinstance checks before accessing combat_summary.get for type safety
